inputs.label: Wall Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the wall to be plastered. Standard construction measurement.

inputs.label: Wall Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of the wall. Standard construction measurement.

inputs.label: Plaster Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Thickness of plaster layer. Typical range 10-20 mm for internal walls.

inputs.label: Mix Ratio (Cement:Sand)
inputs.businessContext: Cement to sand ratio by volume. Common ratios: 1:4 for internal plaster, 1:3 for external.

inputs.label: Cement Density
inputs.businessContext: Bulk density of cement. Typically 1440 kg/m³ per IS 875.

inputs.label: Sand Density
inputs.businessContext: Bulk density of sand. Typically 1600 kg/m³.

inputs.label: Wastage Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage allowance for material wastage during mixing and application. Industry standard 5-10%.

inputs.label: Labor Rate
inputs.businessContext: Cost of labor per square meter of plastering. Varies by region.

inputs.label: Cement Price
inputs.businessContext: Price per bag of cement (typically 50 kg).

inputs.label: Sand Price
inputs.businessContext: Price per cubic meter of sand.

thresholds.wastageFactor > 10: High wastage factor may indicate poor workmanship or material quality.
thresholds.plasterThickness > 20: Thick plaster may require multiple coats or structural assessment.
thresholds.laborRate > 20: Labor cost is above typical market rate.

suggestedActions: Use optimal mix ratio to reduce material cost.
Consider bulk purchasing of cement and sand for discounts.
